summary: Comprehensive testing of LITS (Love In The Sky) AWS S3 verification features completed. All core features working correctly: AWS S3 file uploads for badge/ID verification, Admin Dashboard with presigned URLs for image viewing, Google OAuth button present on auth page, email/password login flow, verification page status display, and profile setup after login.

issues: React hydration warnings for select/option HTML structure - LOW priority, cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: useEffect in AdminDashboard.js and VerificationPage.js has missing dependency warning - can add eslint-disable comment or refactor
No admin role check on verification admin endpoints - any authenticated user can approve/reject verifications (demo mode)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during testing with unique emails (@united.com, @delta.com, @southwest.com domains)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All S3 integrations working with idbucket92100 bucket. AWS credentials properly configured in backend/.env. Presigned URLs generate correctly for secure photo access. Admin dashboard approval/rejection flow fully functional. Google OAuth button present - uses Emergent Auth at auth.emergentagent.com. Both JWT (email/password) and session tokens (OAuth) work for authentication.
features_verified: AWS S3 verification upload - users can upload badge/ID photos stored in S3 bucket idbucket92100
Admin Dashboard - fetches pending verifications, displays photos via presigned URLs, approve/reject works
Google OAuth button appears on auth page (login and signup forms)
Email/password login flow works correctly with airline email domain validation
Verification page shows correct status (email/badge/full) and upload options based on level
Profile setup after login navigates correctly
